sentiment: What the world discards still holds everything it once was.

stories.title: Japan develops a method to recover up to 90% of lithium from used EV batteries
stories.summary: Japanese researchers have developed a technique that recovers up to 90% of lithium from spent EV batteries, potentially transforming the economics of battery recycling and reducing dependence on new mining.

stories.title: The git history command
stories.summary: A deep dive into git log and its lesser-known options for exploring commit history, revealing how the tool remembers every decision even when we forget.

stories.title: Building and shipping Mac and iOS apps without opening Xcode
stories.summary: A guide to building and shipping Apple platform apps entirely from the command line, bypassing Xcode — proving the tools we think we need aren't always the only path forward.
